results.name: hellbending
results.description: Cards that let you go hellbent, usually by letting you empty your entire hand.

results.name: hellbent
results.description: Effects that care about having no cards in hand.

results.name: hellhound
results.description:
"Your dog's on fire." 
"Yeah, he does that."

results.name: hellion
results.description: Monchy bois

results.name: helper card
results.description: Cards printed to assist you with using mechanics.

results.name: heroic
results.description: Whenever you cast a spell targeting your permanent, something good happens.

results.name: heron in the moon
results.description: A shape on Innistrad's moon that is said to look like a heron

results.name: heterochromia
results.description: A condition in which at least one pair of eyes belonging to the same being are different colors.

results.name: hexproof soft
results.description: Stuff is harder to target, but not impossible.

results.name: hidden blade
results.description: A wrist mounted blade from the Assassin's Creed franchise, used for sudden and stealthy assassinations.

results.name: hidden picture
results.description: There's hidden imagery staring you right in the face in these. You think you're staring at a cloud? That's a squirrel.

results.name: hieroglyph
results.description: Ancient Egyptian writing.

results.name: high and dry
results.description: A floating city of Ixalan.

results.name: high five
results.description: Up high! Down low! To the side… too slow!

results.name: high flying
results.description: Flying creatures that can only block other flying creatures. See also [gives high flying](gives-high-flying).

results.name: high x matters
results.description: Cards with X values that do something extra beyond the X effect, as long as X surpasses a specific threshold.

results.name: himoto
results.description: Kaito's Tanuki companion

results.name: hippocamp
results.description: The equine version of a merfolk, a literal sea-horse.

results.name: hippogriff
results.description: Known as gryffs on Innistrad. Not to be confused with griffins.

results.name: hiroku
results.description: One of Tamiyo's children.

results.name: hixus
results.description: A prison warden on Theros who taught Gideon (then Kytheon) the art of hieromancy: white-aligned magic used for enforcement of order and suppressing opposition.

results.name: hobgoblin
results.description: Red/White aligned goblins that appear on Shadowmoor
